mapper.sql: submission_id, package_id, electorate_item_id, tenant_id, account_id, uid, opid, idempotency_key, package_hash, choice_manifest_hash, confirmation_hash, status, submitted_at
mapper.select: SELECT submission_item_id, submission_id, subject_id, choice, unified_ballot_id, item_confirmation_hash FROM t_online_ballot_submission_item WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} ORDER BY subject_id
mapper.sql: request_id, package_id, electorate_item_id, tenant_id, account_id, uid, opid, status, requested_at, fulfilled_at, withdrawn_at, paper_delivery_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_online_paper_assistance_request WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY requested_at, request_id
mapper.update: UPDATE t_online_paper_assistance_request SET status = 'REQUESTED', requested_at = #{requestedAt}, fulfilled_at = NULL, withdrawn_at = NULL, paper_delivery_id = NULL, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'WITHDRAWN'

UPDATE t_online_paper_assistance_request SET status = 'WITHDRAWN', withdrawn_at = #{withdrawnAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'REQUESTED'

UPDATE t_online_paper_assistance_request SET status = 'FULFILLED', fulfilled_at = #{fulfilledAt}, paper_delivery_id = #{paperDeliveryId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'REQUESTED'
